bullets.text: Developed full-stack enterprise web application for resource allocation and scheduling, integrating Java Spring Boot back-end services with Angular front-end components.
Led the design and implementation of an automated UAT testing framework using Selenium, Python, and pytest, enabling data-driven, reusable test cases.
Integrated automated tests into the CI/CD pipeline with Allure reporting, reducing manual effort and improving release reliability.

bullets.label: Front-End Development
bullets.text: Built responsive, user-friendly interfaces using Next.js and React with Tailwind CSS, enhancing accessibility and user engagement across platforms.

bullets.label: Back-End Engineering
bullets.text: Developed RESTful APIs and optimized server-side logic using Express.js with TypeScript, ensuring efficient and secure data handling.

bullets.label: Database Management
bullets.text: Implemented and maintained PostgreSQL databases, optimizing queries for improved performance and reliability.

bullets.label: DevOps & Automation
bullets.text: Managed CI/CD pipelines and automated workflows, integrating security best practices to streamline deployment.
Contributed to the enhancement and maintenance of a Ruby-based implementation of the Origen SDK program, ensuring it conformed to the latest test program revision.
Developed Python scripts for data processing and display of test data on new product units.
Involved in post-silicon development of new products and ran functional tests with advanced test platforms.
Collaborated effectively with team members and supervisors in a team-oriented environment.
Managed and maintained front-end and back-end software, utilizing HTML slicing and company in-built software to ensure seamless functionality and user experience.
Modified existing front-end projects using teamwork and communication to fulfill customer expectations and deliver timely results.
Tested and debugged software to identify issues and ensure error-free code and stable program performance.
